# ProjectW

ProjectW is an Android product company building practical utility apps for real-world mobile workflows.

## Website

https://theprojectw.github.io/

## Apps

- ChargeGuard: Android battery protection and charging monitoring.
- QRcraft: Android QR scanner and QR generator.
- RelayOTP: Secure OTP relay for your own paired phones.

## Contact

wetheprojectw@gmail.com
